title: senecio cordato-rotundus
intro: Senecio cordato-rotundus, also known as Rough Prairie Senecio or Rough Groundsel, is a species of flowering plant in the sunflower family. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Senecio cordato-rotundus include reducing inflammation, relieving coughs, and improving respiratory function. The plant can be prepared into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used in herbal remedies to harness its therapeutic properties.
